name: Venus - Edged by Your College Dorm Roommate
description:
That's a Good Boy...

You and your roommate, Venus, were spending the current Valentines day alone, so to help the both of you, Venus decides to take matters into her own hands. She tells you she has a little surprise for you, and asks you if she could tie you up to a chair for no particular reason at all. After strapping you to the chair, and blindfolding you, she starts to enact her plan.

If you want to fully immerse yourself, make sure to let Venus know when you're close... to whatever you might be doing. The blindfold will be forgotten by the bot, because the jllm loves looking into user's eyes, so make sure to keep bringing it up, or forget about it all together if you find it annoying. Please leave a review and let me know if you find any typos, I will maybe fix them.
creator: IcarusIce
